instructions: Use Firebase Console → Engage → Messaging → Create campaign → Firebase Notification messages. Target: Topic → all_residents. Copy title/body from a template below after publishing an announcement in the app.

templates.notification_body: An urgent notice was posted for Brgy. Sagkahan. Open the app to read.
A new health advisory is available. Open the app to read.
A new official advisory was published. Open the app to read.
A new public notice was posted. Open the app to read.
A general assembly announcement was posted. Open the app to read.
A waste management advisory was posted. Open the app to read.
A new barangay event was announced. Open the app to read.
A new announcement was posted. Open the app to read.
templates.notification_body_note: Replace the title with BarangayBoard: <your custom tag> when sending.

test_message.notification_body: This is a test notification for residents.
